desiredFields.description:
Train with a plan, log every set, and understand your progress without spreadsheets.

StreakRep Fit is a strength training tracker built for lifters, beginners, home training users, and gym athletes who want a clear routine, fast workout logging, and better visibility into what is actually improving.

PLAN SMARTER WORKOUTS
Create your own workout plan or explore ready-made programs for strength, hypertrophy, general fitness, home training, and gym training. Choose training days, goals, equipment, location, exercises, sets, rep ranges, rest times, and progression details so every session has structure before you start.

LOG EVERY SET FAST
During a workout, record weight, reps, completed sets, RPE, rest, notes, and exercise details with a focused session flow. StreakRep keeps your previous context close, so you can stop guessing what you lifted last time and stay focused on the next set.

SEE PROGRESS THAT MAKES SENSE
Track weekly volume, sessions, streaks, consistency, estimated 1RM, personal records, exercise history, strength trends, and progressive overload. The dashboard turns training data into simple visuals so you can spot momentum, plateaus, and missed training patterns.

UNDERSTAND MUSCLE BALANCE
Use the visual exercise catalog and muscle map to browse by body area, select target muscles, review related movements, and understand which muscle groups your plan is training. It is easier to build balanced routines when chest, back, legs, arms, shoulders, core, glutes, and calves are visible at a glance.

TRAIN AT HOME OR IN THE GYM
Filter exercises by equipment, environment, difficulty, and training style. Build routines around dumbbells, barbells, machines, cables, resistance bands, bodyweight movements, mobility, stretching, cardio, or rehabilitation-style recovery work.

STAY CONSISTENT
StreakRep helps you know what to train today, what is scheduled next, how your week is going, and when your training load needs attention. Use quick logging, calendar planning, widgets, Live Activities, and Apple Watch support to keep your routine close wherever you train.

CONNECT WITH APPLE HEALTH
With your permission, StreakRep can read and write compatible Apple Health data such as workouts, activity, body metrics, and related fitness signals. Health data helps connect strength training with a broader view of activity and recovery.

BUILT FOR INTENTIONAL TRAINING
Use StreakRep if you want to:
• Build a custom gym or home workout plan
• Follow structured routines instead of improvising
• Log sets, reps, weight, and rest without friction
• Track strength progress and weekly consistency
• Browse exercises by muscle group and equipment
• Review muscle balance and training focus
• Understand when your training is moving forward

MORE THAN A WORKOUT LOG
StreakRep combines the pieces many lifters usually keep in separate apps: a planner, workout diary, exercise catalog, routine library, progress dashboard, training calendar, muscle map, rest timer, 1RM estimator, and strength history. Your plan, today’s workout, previous performance, and weekly consistency stay connected.

DESIGNED FOR REAL TRAINING
Whether you train three days per week, follow a push pull legs split, build a full body routine, focus on glutes, chase stronger lifts, or just want a reliable gym tracker, StreakRep helps turn every session into useful training data.

STREAKREP PRO
StreakRep Pro unlocks advanced analytics, configurable progression, automatic backups, share cards, premium training tools, and expanded ways to manage your training history.

Download StreakRep Fit and make every workout easier to plan, record, and improve.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
desiredFields.promotionalText: Build smarter workout plans, log every set, track muscle balance, and see strength progress with Health, Apple Watch, widgets, and Live Activities.
desiredFields.whatsNew: StreakRep Fit launches with workout plans, fast set logging, exercise and routine libraries, muscle-based browsing, progress dashboards, Apple Health support, Apple Watch support, widgets, Live Activities, training load insights, and tools for building a more consistent strength routine.

desiredFields.description:
Entrena con un plan, registra cada serie y entiende tu progreso sin hojas de calculo.

StreakRep Fit es un tracker de entrenamiento de fuerza para personas que entrenan en gimnasio, en casa o con material limitado y quieren una rutina clara, registro rapido y datos utiles para saber si realmente estan mejorando.

PLANIFICA MEJOR TUS ENTRENOS
Crea tu propio plan o explora programas preparados para fuerza, hipertrofia, fitness general, entrenamiento en casa y gimnasio. Define dias de entrenamiento, objetivos, material disponible, ubicacion, ejercicios, series, rangos de repeticiones, descansos y detalles de progresion para llegar a cada sesion con estructura.

REGISTRA CADA SERIE SIN FRICCION
Durante el entreno puedes anotar peso, repeticiones, series completadas, RPE, descansos, notas y detalles por ejercicio en un flujo centrado en la sesion. StreakRep mantiene cerca tu historial para que no tengas que adivinar que levantaste la ultima vez.

ENTIENDE TU PROGRESO
Consulta volumen semanal, sesiones, rachas, consistencia, estimacion de 1RM, records personales, historial por ejercicio, tendencias de fuerza y sobrecarga progresiva. El panel de progreso convierte tus datos en graficos claros para detectar impulso, estancamientos y semanas poco consistentes.

VISUALIZA EL EQUILIBRIO MUSCULAR
Usa el catalogo visual y el mapa muscular para explorar ejercicios por zona del cuerpo, seleccionar musculos objetivo, revisar movimientos relacionados y entender que grupos trabaja tu rutina. Es mas facil crear planes equilibrados cuando pecho, espalda, piernas, brazos, hombros, core, gluteos y gemelos se ven de un vistazo.

ENTRENA EN CASA O EN EL GIMNASIO
Filtra ejercicios por material, entorno, dificultad y tipo de entrenamiento. Crea rutinas con mancuernas, barra, maquinas, poleas, bandas, peso corporal, movilidad, estiramientos, cardio o trabajo de recuperacion y rehabilitacion.

MANTEN LA CONSTANCIA
StreakRep te ayuda a saber que toca hoy, que viene despues, como va tu semana y cuando la carga de entrenamiento necesita atencion. Usa registro rapido, calendario, widgets, Live Activities y Apple Watch para mantener tu rutina cerca dentro y fuera de la app.

CONECTA CON APPLE HEALTH
Con tu permiso, StreakRep puede consultar y guardar datos compatibles de Apple Health como entrenos, actividad, metricas corporales y senales relacionadas con fitness. Asi puedes conectar el entrenamiento de fuerza con una vision mas amplia de actividad y recuperacion.

PARA ENTRENAR CON INTENCION
Usa StreakRep si quieres:
• Crear un plan de gimnasio o casa
• Seguir rutinas estructuradas en vez de improvisar
• Registrar series, repeticiones, peso y descanso rapido
• Medir fuerza, volumen y consistencia semanal
• Explorar ejercicios por musculo y material
• Revisar equilibrio muscular y foco de entrenamiento
• Entender si tu rutina avanza semana a semana

MAS QUE UN DIARIO DE ENTRENOS
StreakRep une piezas que muchos usuarios llevan separadas: planificador, registro de entrenos, catalogo de ejercicios, biblioteca de rutinas, panel de progreso, calendario, mapa muscular, temporizador de descanso, calculadora de 1RM e historial de fuerza. Tu plan, el entreno de hoy, el rendimiento anterior y la consistencia semanal quedan conectados.

DISEÑADA PARA ENTRENAR DE VERDAD
Si entrenas tres dias por semana, sigues un push pull legs, haces full body, quieres mejorar gluteos, progresar en fuerza o simplemente necesitas un tracker de gimnasio fiable, StreakRep convierte cada sesion en datos utiles.

STREAKREP PRO
StreakRep Pro desbloquea analitica avanzada, progresion configurable, copias de seguridad automaticas, tarjetas para compartir avances, herramientas premium y mas opciones para gestionar tu historial.

Descarga StreakRep Fit y haz que cada entreno sea mas facil de planificar, registrar y mejorar.

Terminos de uso: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
desiredFields.promotionalText: Crea rutinas, registra cada serie, mide equilibrio muscular y entiende tu progreso con Salud, Apple Watch, widgets y Live Activities.
desiredFields.whatsNew: StreakRep Fit llega con planes de entrenamiento, registro rapido de series, biblioteca de ejercicios y rutinas, busqueda por musculos, paneles de progreso, soporte para Apple Health, Apple Watch, widgets, Live Activities, analisis de carga y herramientas para entrenar fuerza con mas constancia.
